case_title: DAN YU CARPET CO VS THE CABANA CLUB INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAN YU CARPET CO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE CABANA CLUB INC. $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $204.49 INTEREST, $34.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,638.49 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
